players.name: Jackie Bradley Jr.
players.reason: Former MLB All-Star, 2018 World Series champion, first overall pick in Banana Ball draft; extensive ESPN/Boston Globe coverage

players.name: Mo'ne Davis
players.reason: Little League World Series legend since 2014, nationally famous independent of Banana Ball; heavy signing coverage

players.name: Correlle Prime
players.reason: Called 'The Ohtani of Banana Ball,' established star who pitched to 65,000 fans before joining Clowns

players.name: Peanuts The Elephant
players.reason: 'First mascot pitcher in baseball history,' viral debut moment, heavily featured in team media

players.name: Mat Wolf
players.reason: Signature rodeo-clown act inherited from his father, 5th-season veteran, recurring feature subject

players.name: Eli Paton
players.reason: 4th player in Banana Ball history to hit for the cycle, multiple viral trick-play clips

players.name: Joe Lytle
players.reason: Multiyear veteran (since 2023), 'Best Mullet in Banana Ball,' hit for the cycle, strong social following

players.name: Fisher Polydoroff
players.reason: Viral 'Ole Knuckles' 1950s time-traveler persona, unanimous draft selection, musician angle

players.name: Malachi Mitchell
players.reason: 'Flash Tha Kid,' signature backflip moves, repeatedly featured in local media

players.name: Joe Gray Jr.
players.reason: Named 'Showman of the game,' series-winning plays, storyline tie to Jackie Bradley Jr.

players.name: Jalen Vasquez
players.reason: Former Orioles farmhand, local hometown media features, standing ovations

players.name: Clark Gilmore
players.reason: Viral one-minute tryout video, Dartmouth/Notre Dame academic background

players.name: Vinny Santarsiero
players.reason: Viral dance clip, local news feature on custom Clowns-branded cleats

players.name: Niko Hulsizer
players.reason: NCAA home run leader (2017), Dodgers draftee; dedicated SI feature

players.name: Kirkland Banks
players.reason: Two-sport college standout at Lamar, multiple regional feature articles

players.name: Brett Maddock
players.reason: 'Nurse Brett' storyline, started historic first Clowns game at Kauffman Stadium

players.name: Nick Wilson
players.reason: Viral tryout story (dressed as TMNT's Donatello), Negro Leagues family connection

players.name: Chris Burgess
players.reason: Negro Leagues family lineage gives unique media hook; featured in highlight clips

players.name: Bobby Lada
players.reason: Featured in Yahoo Sports round-ups, but no standalone spotlight

players.name: Gage Voorhees
players.reason: Modest presence: brief team social post, small personal following

players.name: Brian Dansereau
players.reason: Podcast appearance plus routine game-day photo mentions

players.name: David Griffin
players.reason: Only routine game-day photo captions; no dedicated feature

players.name: Dayan Reinoso
players.reason: Minor league press release plus a first-at-bat home run anecdote

players.name: Kobe Robinson
players.reason: Only appears in roster listings; no individual feature or viral moment

players.name: Daniel Foster
players.reason: Only a pre-debut announcement post and player-card listing

players.name: Andrew Irvine
players.reason: Only local college alumni note (Iowa) and routine game photos

players.name: Dale Francis Jr.
players.reason: No confirmed Banana Ball connection found; possible name-match ambiguity

notes: Rankings based on volume/nature of public web coverage as of July 2026. Jackie Bradley Jr. and Mo'ne Davis famous independent of Banana Ball.
